action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to requester clarification when required information is missing
Escalates to Procurement Manager when preferred supplier is restricted
Escalates to Head of Strategic Sourcing when the value exceeds the threshold.
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > threshold_value

action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to Head of Category when no compliant supplier is found.
Escalates to Security and Compliance Review when there is a data residency constraint conflict.
action_tuple: WHEN data_residency_constraint = True AND data_residency_supported = False
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN data_residency_constraint = True AND data_residency_supported = False

action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to Sourcing Excellence Lead due to single-supplier capacity risk.
Escalates to Marketing Governance Lead for brand safety concerns
Escalates to Regional Compliance Lead if the supplier is not registered or sanctioned-screened in the delivery country and the currency is USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Ensure at least three compliant supplier options are compared for IT/Laptops category when budget exceeds EUR/CHF 100000
action_tuple: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead for mobile workstation requests above 50 units
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Mobile Workstations
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Mobile Workstations

action_logs.rule_description: Ensures that only suppliers supporting data residency requirements are considered for requests with data residency constraints in the IT > Cloud Compute category
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Cloud Compute
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Cloud Compute

action_logs.rule_description: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Reception and Lounge Furniture"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces CV review requirement for consulting requests exceeding 60 days in Professional Services > Software Development Services
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"

action_logs.rule_description: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Cybersecurity Advisory"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces brand-safety review for influencer campaigns in Marketing category
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Influencer Campaign Management"

action_logs.rule_description: Compute intermediate _rep_esg as 0.2 * esg_score
Compute intermediate _rep_risk_base as 100 - risk_score
Compute intermediate _rep_risk as 0.3 * (100 - risk_score)
Compute intermediate _rep_quality as 0.5 * quality_score
Compute reputation_score as the sum of _rep_quality, _rep_risk, and _rep_esg
Compute intermediate _crs_denom as cost_total + 1
Compute cost_total as quantity * unit_price
Compute intermediate _crs_raw as 10000000 / (cost_total + 1)
Compute cost_rank_score as min(_crs_raw, 100)
Compute intermediate _rank_cost_component as cost_rank_score * 100
Compute rank as cost_rank_score * 100 + reputation_score

action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 500000 AND budget <= 4999999.99 AND currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalate to CPO for high-value contracts in CHF currency
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 5000000 AND budget <= 999999999.99 AND currency = CHF
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 5000000 AND budget <= 999999999.99 AND currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Escalate to CPO for contracts exceeding CHF 5,000,000
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 5000000 AND budget <= 999999999.99 AND currency = CHF
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 5000000 AND budget <= 999999999.99 AND currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Sets single quote requirement for USD budgets up to 27,000
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 27000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 27000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 2 for USD budgets between 27,000 and 108,000
action_tuple: WHEN budget > 27000 AND budget <= 108000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > 27000 AND budget <= 108000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Escalate to Procurement Manager for USD budgets between 27,000 and 108,000
action_tuple: WHEN budget > 27000 AND budget <= 108000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > 27000 AND budget <= 108000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Sets minimum supplier quotes and Head of Category escalation for USD budgets between 108,000 and 540,000
action_tuple: WHEN budget > 108000 AND budget <= 540000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > 108000 AND budget <= 540000 AND currency = USD

action_tuple: WHEN budget > 108000 AND budget <= 540000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > 108000 AND budget <= 540000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalate to Head of Strategic Sourcing for budgets between 540,000 and 5,400,000 USD
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 540000 AND budget <= 5400000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 540000 AND budget <= 5400000 AND currency = USD

action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 540000 AND budget <= 5400000 AND currency = USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 540000 AND budget <= 5400000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and CPO escalation for budgets exceeding $5,400,000 in USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > 5400000 AND currency = USD
WHEN budget > 5400000 AND currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Compute intermediate _rep_esg as 0.2 * esg_score
Compute intermediate _rep_risk_base as 100 - risk_score
Compute intermediate _rep_risk as 0.3 * (100 - risk_score)
Compute intermediate _rep_quality as 0.5 * quality_score
Compute reputation_score as the sum of _rep_quality, _rep_risk, and _rep_esg
Compute intermediate _crs_denom as cost_total + 1
Compute cost_total as quantity * unit_price
Compute intermediate _crs_raw as 10000000 / (cost_total + 1)
Compute cost_rank_score as min(_crs_raw, 100)
Compute intermediate _rank_cost_component as cost_rank_score * 100
Compute rank as cost_rank_score * 100 + reputation_score

supplier_logs.exclusion_reason: category_l2 mismatch ('Cloud Security Services' != 'Managed Cloud Platform Services')
category_l2 mismatch ('Cloud Compute' != 'Managed Cloud Platform Services')
category_l2 mismatch ('Cloud Storage' != 'Managed Cloud Platform Services')
category_l2 mismatch ('Cloud Networking' != 'Managed Cloud Platform Services')

action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to requester clarification when required information is missing
Escalates to Procurement Manager when preferred supplier is restricted
Escalates to Head of Strategic Sourcing when the value exceeds the threshold.
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget > threshold_value

action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to Head of Category when no compliant supplier is found.
Escalates to Security and Compliance Review when there is a data residency constraint conflict.
action_tuple: WHEN data_residency_constraint = True AND data_residency_supported = False
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN data_residency_constraint = True AND data_residency_supported = False

action_logs.rule_description: Escalates to Sourcing Excellence Lead due to single-supplier capacity risk.
Escalates to Marketing Governance Lead for brand safety concerns
Escalates to Regional Compliance Lead if the supplier is not registered or sanctioned-screened in the delivery country and the currency is USD
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = USD

action_logs.rule_description: Ensure at least three compliant supplier options are compared for IT/Laptops category when budget exceeds EUR/CHF 100000
action_tuple: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead for mobile workstation requests above 50 units
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Mobile Workstations
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Mobile Workstations

action_logs.rule_description: Ensures that only suppliers supporting data residency requirements are considered for requests with data residency constraints in the IT > Cloud Compute category
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Cloud Compute
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Cloud Compute

action_logs.rule_description: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Reception and Lounge Furniture"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces CV review requirement for consulting requests exceeding 60 days in Professional Services > Software Development Services
action_tuple: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"

action_logs.rule_description: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Cybersecurity Advisory"

action_logs.rule_description: Enforces brand-safety review for influencer campaigns in Marketing category
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN category_l2 = "Influencer Campaign Management"
